doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The document contains legally implausible provisions that contradict California unauthorized practice doctrine and State Bar ethics rules, particularly the waiver of attorney pre-filing review and post-filing countersignature requirements.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document contains legally implausible provisions (attorney countersignature not required for validity, paralegals drafting motions without pre-filing review) that contradict established California legal ethics rules and unauthorized practice doctrine, uses anachronistic framing ("2025" protocol released as current), and lacks verifiable institutional markers (no regulation number, no official State Bar citation format, no board approval documentation).
